errorMessage.title: Error Message
errorMessage.description: Error message when no properties are found or search term is missing

matchCount.title: Match Count
matchCount.description: The number of properties found matching the search term

matchList.title: Match List
matchList.description: A numbered list of matching properties when multiple results are found

propertyAddress.title: Property Address
propertyAddress.description: The formatted address of the matched property

propertyId.title: Property Id
propertyId.description: The Salesforce record ID of the matched property (set only when exactly one match is found)

propertyName.title: Property Name
propertyName.description: The name of the matched property
